resultList.dtldesc: Located in the well-planned residential pocket of Sector 70A, Gurgaon, this ready-to-move 4 BHK apartment presents a spacious and well-appointed living environment within a low-rise residential block. Situated near Elan Commercial Mall and the Tulip Residential Complex, the property benefits from a balanced setting that combines residential calm with convenient access to daily essentials and emerging commercial hubs.::::Property Specifications::The apartment has a super built-up area of approximately 2892 sq. ft and a carpet area of around 2000 sq. ft. It is positioned on the third floor of a three-storey building comprising a limited number of residential units, ensuring enhanced privacy. The layout includes four bedrooms, three bathrooms and four balconies, offering generous internal space and ample natural ventilation. The living and dining areas are combined, creating a fluid and open configuration suitable for both family living and entertaining. Overlooking landscaped garden areas, the apartment enjoys pleasant views and a peaceful outlook. The kitchen is modular and fitted with a chimney, complemented by an available piped gas connection for everyday convenience. Flooring throughout the apartment is finished with vitrified tiles, providing a clean and durable finish. The property is Vaastu compliant, north-facing, and is offered in a fully furnished condition. A separate servant room with an attached washroom adds functional value for larger households.::::Facilities::The apartment includes two covered parking spaces and benefits from a continuous water supply. The building is supported by 100 percent power backup, ensuring uninterrupted daily operations. Security arrangements include on-site security personnel and CCTV surveillance for enhanced safety. Lift access is available within the building, facilitating ease of movement across floors.::::Locality::Sector 70A is a steadily developing residential zone in Gurgaon, known for its proximity to commercial centres, educational institutions and healthcare facilities. Schools, hospitals and local markets are available within approximately 300 metres, while public transport connectivity is improving with a metro corridor proposed in the vicinity. The area offers smooth road connectivity to key parts of Gurgaon and surrounding business districts.::::Ideal Occupier Profile::This property is well suited for families seeking a spacious, furnished apartment in a low-density residential environment with modern facilities and strong neighbourhood infrastructure.
